# tidyrgeoda

![CRAN](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/tidyrgeoda)![r-universe](https://spatlyu.r-universe.dev/badges/tidyrgeoda)

The goal of **tidyrgeoda** is to provide an interface for **rgeoda** to
integrate with **sf** objects and the **tidyverse**.

## Installation

You can install the development version of **tidyrgeoda** from
[github](https://github.com/SpatLyu/tidyrgeoda):

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("SpatLyu/tidyrgeoda",
                         build_vignettes = T,
                         dep = T)
```

or install **tidyrgeoda** from
[r-universe](https://spatlyu.r-universe.dev/tidyrgeoda):

``` r
install.packages('tidyrgeoda', 
                 repos = c("https://spatlyu.r-universe.dev",
                           "https://cran.rstudio.com/"),
                 dep = TRUE)
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to use `tidyrgeoda` to
create a `spatial weight matrix` and calculate the `local_moran`:

``` r
library(sf)
## Linking to GEOS 3.12.1, GDAL 3.8.4, PROJ 9.3.1; sf_use_s2() is TRUE
```

``` r
library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
## ✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
## ✔ ggplot2   3.5.1     ✔ tibble    3.2.1
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.3     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
## ✔ purrr     1.0.2
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
```

``` r
library(tidyrgeoda)
## Welcome to tidyrgeoda 0.1.1!
```

``` r

guerry = read_sf(system.file("extdata","Guerry.shp",package = "rgeoda"))
guerry %>% 
  mutate(lisa = st_local_moran(.,'Crm_prs',
                               wt = st_weights(.,'contiguity',queen = T))) %>% 
  select(lisa) -> g_lisa
g_lisa
## Simple feature collection with 85 features and 1 field
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: 47680 ymin: 1703258 xmax: 1031401 ymax: 2677441
## Projected CRS: NTF (Paris) / Lambert zone II
## # A tibble: 85 × 2
##    lisa                                                                 geometry
##    <fct>                                                      <MULTIPOLYGON [m]>
##  1 Not significant (((801150 2092615, 800669 2093190, 800688 2095430, 800780 20…
##  2 High-High       (((729326 2521619, 729320 2521230, 729280 2518544, 728751 25…
##  3 High-High       (((710830 2137350, 711746 2136617, 712430 2135212, 712070 21…
##  4 Not significant (((882701 1920024, 882408 1920733, 881778 1921200, 881526 19…
##  5 Not significant (((886504 1922890, 885733 1922978, 885479 1923276, 883061 19…
##  6 Low-Low         (((747008 1925789, 746630 1925762, 745723 1925138, 744216 19…
##  7 Not significant (((818893 2514767, 818614 2514515, 817900 2514467, 817327 25…
##  8 Low-Low         (((509103 1747787, 508820 1747513, 508154 1747093, 505861 17…
##  9 Not significant (((775400 2345600, 775068 2345397, 773587 2345177, 772940 23…
## 10 Low-Low         (((626230 1810121, 626269 1810496, 627494 1811321, 627681 18…
## # ℹ 75 more rows
```

``` r

ggplot(data = g_lisa) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = lisa),lwd = .1,color = 'grey') +
  scale_fill_lisa()
```

![](reference/figures/README-example-1.png)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`gzma`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/gzma.md) :
  Guangzhou Metropolitan Social Space Quality Score Data
- [`read_geoda()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/read_geoda.md)
  : Read A Geoda File(.gal,.gwt,.swm)
- [`scale_fill_lisa()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/scale_fill_lisa.md)
  : LISA Fill Scales
- [`st_azp_greedy()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_azp_greedy.md)
  : A greedy algorithm to solve the AZP problem
- [`st_azp_sa()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_azp_sa.md)
  : A simulated annealing algorithm to solve the AZP problem
- [`st_azp_tabu()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_azp_tabu.md)
  : A tabu algorithm to solve the AZP problem
- [`st_breaks()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_breaks.md)
  : Univariate Spatial Stratification
- [`st_contiguity_weights()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_contiguity_weights.md)
  : Contiguity Spatial Weights
- [`st_distance_weights()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_distance_weights.md)
  : Distance-based Spatial Weights
- [`st_kernel_knn_weights()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_kernel_knn_weights.md)
  : K-NN Kernel Spatial Weights
- [`st_kernel_weights()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_kernel_weights.md)
  : Distance-based Kernel Spatial Weights
- [`st_knn_weights()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_knn_weights.md)
  : K-Nearest Neighbors-based Spatial Weights
- [`st_lag()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_lag.md)
  : Spatial Lag
- [`st_lnmt()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_lnmt.md)
  : Local Neighbor Match Test
- [`st_local_bijoincount()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_bijoincount.md)
  : Bivariate Local Join Count Statistics
- [`st_local_bimoran()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_bimoran.md)
  : Bivariate Local Moran Statistics
- [`st_local_g()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_g.md)
  : Local Getis-Ord's G Statistics
- [`st_local_geary()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_geary.md)
  : Local Geary Statistics
- [`st_local_gstar()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_gstar.md)
  : Local Getis-Ord's G\* Statistics
- [`st_local_joincount()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_joincount.md)
  : Local Join Count Statistics
- [`st_local_moran()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_moran.md)
  : Local Moran Statistics
- [`st_local_moran_eb()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_moran_eb.md)
  : Local Moran with Empirical Bayes(EB) Rate
- [`st_local_multigeary()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_multigeary.md)
  : Local Multivariate Geary Statistics
- [`st_local_multijoincount()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_multijoincount.md)
  : (Multivariate) Colocation Local Join Count Statistics
- [`st_local_multiquantilelisa()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_multiquantilelisa.md)
  : Multivariate Quantile LISA Statistics
- [`st_local_quantilelisa()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_local_quantilelisa.md)
  : Quantile LISA Statistics
- [`st_maxp_greedy()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_maxp_greedy.md)
  : A greedy algorithm to solve the max-p-region problem
- [`st_maxp_sa()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_maxp_sa.md)
  : A simulated annealing algorithm to solve the max-p-region problem
- [`st_maxp_tabu()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_maxp_tabu.md)
  : A tabu-search algorithm to solve the max-p-region problem
- [`st_redcap()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_redcap.md)
  : Regionalization with dynamically constrained agglomerative
  clustering and partitioning(REDCAP)
- [`st_schc()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_schc.md)
  : Spatially Constrained Hierarchical Clucstering (SCHC)
- [`st_skater()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_skater.md)
  : Spatial C(K)luster Analysis by Tree Edge Removal(SKATER)
- [`st_summary()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_summary.md)
  : Summary of Spatial Weights
- [`st_weights()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/st_weights.md)
  : Construct Spatial Weights
- [`write_geoda()`](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/reference/write_geoda.md)
  : Save Spatial Weights

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Local Indicators of Spatial
  Association(LISA)](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/articles/Local-Indicators-of-Spatial-Association.md):
- [Spatial Weights in
  tidyrgeoda](https://spatlyu.github.io/tidyrgeoda/articles/Spatial-Weights.md):
